edges.evidence_quote: In 2000, the United Nations gang were involved in a notably bloody brawl with the Hells Angels at the Animals nightclub in Abbotsford
edges.context: The United Nations fought a brawl with the Hells Angels at a nightclub.

edges.evidence_quote: On the night of 22 December 2002, members of the UN gang led by James Thiphavong were involved in a bloody brawl with members of the Red Scorpions
edges.context: The United Nations engaged in a brawl and subsequent murders with the Red Scorpions.

edges.evidence_quote: Kaawach ... served as his liaison with the Sinaloa Cartel, working out deals to exchange the prized B.C. Bud for cocaine.
edges.context: United Nations allied with Sinaloa Cartel to exchange marijuana for cocaine.

edges.evidence_quote: the group fought a number of turf wars against other gangs, most notably the Red Scorpions.
edges.context: United Nations fought turf wars against Red Scorpions.

edges.evidence_quote: They also led a turf war against the Independent Soldiers gang, as it sought to establish itself.
edges.context: United Nations fought a turf war against Independent Soldiers.

edges.evidence_quote: Roueche forged a close alliance with the Fresh Off the Boat Killers, a Calgary gang made up of Chinese-Canadians, Korean-Canadians and Vietnamese-Canadians.
edges.context: United Nations allied with Fresh Off the Boat Killers, providing oversight and cocaine supply.

edges.evidence_quote: The Fresh Off the Boat Killers are the rivals of another gang called Fresh Off the Boat.
edges.context: Fresh Off the Boat Killers are rivals of Fresh Off the Boat.

edges.evidence_quote: After establishing themselves against the Hells Angels, the two gangs reached a modus vivendi in 2005.
edges.context: United Nations initially opposed Hells Angels, then reached a working agreement.

edges.evidence_quote: The conflict with the Independent Soldiers led to the alliance with the Hells Angels.
edges.context: United Nations and Hells Angels later formed an alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2008–2009, a violent gang war was brewing in the Lower Mainland area of B.C., with the UN gang believed to be playing a major role in it as the UN gang fought the Red Scorpions led by the Bacon Brothers.
edges.context: The United Nations and Red Scorpions were engaged in a violent gang war.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.
edges.context: Hells Angels sold guns to United Nations via their proxy Independent Soldiers.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.
edges.context: Hells Angels sold guns to Red Scorpions via their proxy Independent Soldiers.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.
edges.context: Independent Soldiers, as proxy for Hells Angels, sold guns to United Nations.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.
edges.context: Independent Soldiers, as proxy for Hells Angels, sold guns to Red Scorpions.

edges.evidence_quote: Roueche imported several Fresh Off the Boat Killers from Calary, most notably Billy Ly and Troy Tran, to assist with killing the Bacon brothers.
edges.context: United Nations imported Fresh Off the Boat Killers as assassins to target the Bacon brothers.

edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang came to be involved in a violent feud with the Wolfpack Alliance led by Larry Amero and Rabih "Robby" Alkhalil of the Alkhalil family.
edges.context: United Nations and Wolfpack Alliance were engaged in a violent feud.

edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang came to be involved in a violent feud with the Wolfpack Alliance led by Larry Amero and Rabih "Robby" Alkhalil of the Alkhalil family.
edges.context: The Alkhalil family is part of the Wolfpack Alliance leadership.

edges.evidence_quote: On 25 June 2012, Randy Naicker, the leader of the Independent Soldiers and a Wolfpack member, was murdered by the UN gang in Port Moody.
edges.context: United Nations murdered the leader of the Independent Soldiers.
